name: agent-delegation
description: Create and delegate tasks to specialized agents, track progress, and manage task lifecycle. Supports priority queuing and capability-based agent matching.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new delegatable task. Required capabilities as comma-separated string.

tools.name: delegate_task
tools.description: Assign a pending task to a specific agent.

tools.name: get_task_status
tools.description: Check the current status and progress of a task.

tools.name: list_available_agents
tools.description: List all registered agents and their capabilities. Optionally filter by required capability.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as complete with results, or as failed with error details.
